shadcn-html / descriptions

Made from: CSS

Descriptions

A key-value display for metadata and details. Built on the native <dl> description list element.

Component Specification — components/descriptions/descriptions.md

Native basis

<dl> (description list) element with <dt> (term) and <dd> (details) pairs.

Web Platform APIs

<dl> <dt> <dd>

Layout (data-layout)

verticalTerms stacked above details (default) horizontalTerms beside details in a row

Accessibility

• <dl> is natively accessible — screen readers announce term-detail associations

• Wrapping <dt>/<dd> pairs in <div> is valid HTML and aids styling

Vertical (Default)

Terms stacked above their details.

Name
Jordan Davis
Email
jdavis@email.com
Role
Administrator
Status
Active
<dl class="descriptions">
  <div class="descriptions-item">
    <dt class="descriptions-term">Name</dt>
    <dd class="descriptions-detail">Jordan Davis</dd>
  </div>
</dl>

Horizontal

Terms beside details in a row layout.

Name
Jordan Davis
Email
jdavis@email.com
Phone
+1 (555) 123-4567
Address
123 Main St, Springfield, IL 62701
<dl class="descriptions" data-layout="horizontal">
  <div class="descriptions-item">
    <dt class="descriptions-term">Name</dt>
    <dd class="descriptions-detail">Jordan Davis</dd>
  </div>
</dl>

In a Card

Descriptions composed with .card, .avatar, and .badge for a user profile detail view.

JD

Jordan Davis

Account details

Active
Email
jdavis@email.com
Role
Administrator
Joined
January 15, 2024
